---
title: ""
---

::: {.hero-home}

![](images/profile.jpg){.home-profile}

<div class="hero-badge">Business Analytics Portfolio</div>

# Hi, I’m Olive Edeko

I am a Master's student in Business Analytics at Dublin City University with a strong interest in data-driven decision-making, predictive modelling, and strategic analysis.

This portfolio brings together my projects, reflections, and personal interests to show how I combine analytical thinking with clear communication and real-world business understanding.

::: {.hero-buttons}
[View Projects](projects/index.qmd){.btn .btn-primary .me-2}
[View CV](Olive_Edeko_CV_2026.pdf){.btn .btn-outline-primary}
:::

:::

## What I Do

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.feature-box}
### 📊 Data Analysis
Using Python, SQL, Excel, and Power BI to explore datasets, identify patterns, and communicate insights clearly.
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.feature-box}
### 🤖 Predictive Modelling
Applying machine learning and analytical methods to support forecasting, evaluation, and decision-making.
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.feature-box}
### 📈 Business Insights
Connecting technical analysis with strategy, communication, and practical business recommendations.
:::
:::

:::

## Featured Projects

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.project-card}
## Yelp Dataset Analysis

Predicting business ratings using category-level data, business attributes, and machine learning techniques.

[View Project](projects/project-1.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.project-card}
## Fraud Pattern Recognition

Identifying high-risk demographic patterns and exploring how data can support fraud mitigation strategies.

[View Project](projects/project-2.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}
:::
:::

:::
